title: Soulful Japa:Session 20 :Revealing Experience- The Gardner Story & Impact of Golden Quotes-Module 38
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: Hello Prabhupada Ki Jai, Hare Krishna Nama Prabhu Ki Jai, welcome all of you, so today
I will be talking about the very revealing experience that I had about 10 years ago which
changed my whole japa.
I want to share with you the experience.
10 years back I felt like for few days I should take off from Bangalore temple and go to the
Mysore farm.
There was nobody, it is a very quiet place, I wanted to stay there 10 days.
And I went with the determination that this 10 days I should go to the Mysore farm.
10 days I am going to chant every day 108 rounds.
Accordingly, I reached the Mysore farm and then I settled into the guest house.
And to help me out in case I needed anything, during the day time a middle aged gardener
was made to wait upon me outside the room.
And as usual, I went to the Mysore farm.
As usual, I started, means as planned I started my chanting every morning 5 o'clock.
And till then I had not gone anywhere beyond 25 rounds.
So, when I finished my 16 rounds, after that, you know, somehow I went up to 25-30 rounds,
then it became very difficult.
Mind was saying do this, do that.
I was not able to do it.
I was not able to do it.
I was not able to do that.
Check out the mail and call Bangalore for something.
All kinds of things were coming into my mind, including, you know, some ideas, some real
realization I got, let me go and type it out, all kinds of things.
And I was thinking, I knew that if I take away time for anything, then I will not be
able to complete 108 rounds by night.
So, therefore, that was a discouragement for me to actually deviate into enlightenment.
So, that was a discouragement for me to actually deviate into enlightenment.
That was a discouragement for me to actually deviate into enlightenment.
I couldn't do anything else.

finished.

it.

This is Yugadharma, anybody can chant, anybody is capable of chanting, this is Yugadharma.
